uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation "Bell v. Wolfish" --citation "Estelle v. Gamble" --limit 8 2>query_stderr.txt | python3 -c "
import sys, json
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: r=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    print(r.get('case_id'), '|', (r.get('caption') or '')[:80], '|', r.get('disposition'), '|', r.get('resolved_at') or r.get('decided_at'), '|', r.get('era'))
"; echo '--- stderr ---'; cat query_stderr.txt
